data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of an AI-generated parameter scenario, but the evidence provided does not include any specific results or traces from the simulation. While the expected result indicates that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a failure report, there is no concrete evidence to support that this validation was successfully executed or documented. The lack of direct evidence regarding the outcome of the simulation leads to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of the simulation results or traces to confirm the scenario behavior.
